heading: Instant transfers
content: Send money to any bank or mobile money account in seconds. Available 24/7.

heading: Virtual card
content: Get a virtual Visa card instantly. Shop online, subscribe globally, pay in USD.

heading: Bank-grade security

heading: Cross-border payments

heading: Mobile money

heading: Business dashboard
content: Bulk payments, collections, and analytics for growing businesses.
